programmes.show_description: In the second instalment of the series, the campmates are in split camps which causes drama, and two new celebrities join them in either the main camp or Savannah Scrub.

programmes.show_name: Why Are We So Tired? Tonight
programmes.show_description: According to a 2022 YouGov survey, more than a third of us in the UK feel tired most or all of the time. Datshiane Navanayagam investigates the steps can we take to beat fatigue.
